name: SU(2)₃ Chern-Simons to Sacred Physics Chain
description: Composition path: constants → chern-simons → sacred_physics. Demonstrates CLARA-style spec → gen → test → verdict → experience pipeline.

steps.name: spec-seal-constants
steps.description: Seal the current skill specification with cryptographic hash

steps.name: gen-constants
steps.description: Generate Zig/C code from math/constants spec
steps.note: No --backend flag uses default; check tri help for available backends

steps.name: test-constants
steps.description: Run conformance tests for math constants
steps.expected_outcome: all tests pass, TRINITY invariant holds
steps.verify_by: output shows 'passed' for TRINITY identity test

steps.name: spec-seal-chern-simons
steps.description: Seal Chern-Simons spec with cryptographic hash

steps.name: gen-chern-simons
steps.description: Generate code from Chern-Simons spec (depends on constants)
steps.note: CS category tests quantum dimension d_τ = φ with 50+ decimal precision

steps.name: test-chern-simons
steps.description: Run high-precision Chern-Simons tests (50+ decimal places)
steps.expected_outcome: all CS tests pass, d_τ ≈ φ within 1e-10

steps.name: spec-seal-sacred-physics
steps.description: Seal sacred physics spec with cryptographic hash

steps.name: gen-sacred-physics
steps.description: Generate code from sacred physics spec

steps.name: test-sacred-physics
steps.description: Run conformance tests for sacred physics
steps.expected_outcome: all tests pass, TRINITY verification holds
steps.verify_by: output shows 'passed' for sacred physics tests

steps.name: verdict-phi
steps.description: Run final verdict for sacred physics chain (TRINITY verification)
steps.verify_by: kepler_newton_tests.py reports sacred category with all passed
steps.note: This is the CLARA verdict step — validates the entire composition chain

steps.name: experience-save
steps.command: tri gen specs/math/sacred_physics.t27  # Auto-records on successful gen
steps.description: Generate final sacred_physics (Trinity auto-records experience on successful gen)
steps.expected_outcome: gen output matches spec + episode written to .trinity/experience/
steps.note: Experience is auto-recorded by Trinity after successful tri gen. Manual save command exists but is not standard workflow.

invariants.chern_simons_level_theorem: For SU(2)_k at k=3: φ^2 + φ^-2 = k

toxicity_policy.unblock_requires: Explicit resolution and removal from mistakes.jsonl
